svg.text: CHROME CIRCUIT COWBOYS — UNDERGROUND ROOM MAP (L1-99, carved)
Each column = one arc, rooms in descent order. Letters between rooms = the actual exit direction (varies). [^]/[v] = ceiling/floor loot cache. Entry: Back Alley D-> z1_01.
